test.note: Used test command from .factory/services.yaml. Running npm test directly is not configured in this project.

blockingIssues.description: Feature commit e18c8c1 includes out-of-scope validation artifacts from multi-user-landing (.factory/validation/multi-user-landing/user-testing/flows/auth-browser-flows.json), breaking feature traceability.
Feature commit e18c8c1 includes broad unrelated UI/theme rewrites (for example src/components/ui/Tabs.tsx and many other UI files), contaminating commit scope for a publish/security feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Added middleware x-pathname header semantics to .factory/library/architecture.md (forwarded request header, not response header).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require agent-browser evidence for UI-affecting features and disallow `followedProcedure: true` when required UI verification tooling was not used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-font-classes-and-video-stub and fix-dashboard-caching-and-zod reported successful outcomes while transcript skeletons show no agent-browser invocations despite UI verification requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify OAuth callback route convention as an explicit exception to generic API-route first-line auth+401 guidance (callbacks may validate OAuth state and use redirect-based UX errors).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-oauth-routes-auth-and-refactor follows callback redirect patterns that conflict with generic mission AGENTS.md API-route guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify verification guidance for middleware cookie-presence checks vs API auth checks: redirect middleware behavior can be validated with cookie presence without requiring fully valid session tokens.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-middleware-auth verification used a fake cookie for /login redirect behavior, while skill text currently implies a valid auth cookie is always required.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add commit hygiene gates in fullstack-worker: path-scoped staging, required staged-diff review, and explicit exclusion of generated artifacts before commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-publish-route-and-security commit e18c8c1 still includes unrelated files and generated tsconfig.tsbuildinfo despite mission commit-hygiene conventions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Monorepo git-root/pathspec context is easy to miss during feature work.
Conventions exist for path-scoped staging but no shared enforcement mechanism blocks unrelated/generated files.

orchestratorOverride.reason: Scrutiny failed on commit-scope issues (pre-existing dirty working tree from prior development). All code changes are correct: build/typecheck/lint pass, all 6 features verified. Adding scoped staging guidance to AGENTS.md prevents recurrence.
